message:
Command `# LibreLane PID 286668, output to /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log, no pipe issues.
# Monitor with 10-min polls until completion or 8h timeout.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=286668

for i in $(seq 1 48); do
  sleep 600
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-90)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  FINAL=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} | step=$STEP | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) | $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL" ] && echo "  *** GDS WRITTEN: $FINAL ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    echo "Run dir:"
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
    echo ""
    echo "Last 50 lines of log:"
    tail -50 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done` executed with exit code -1.

{"command": "# LibreLane PID 286668, output to /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log, no pipe issues.
# Monitor with 10-min polls until completion or 8h timeout.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

  sleep 600
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-90)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  FINAL=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} | step=$STEP | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) | $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL" ] && echo "  *** GDS WRITTEN: $FINAL ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    echo "Run dir:"
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
    echo ""
    echo "Last 50 lines of log:"
    tail -50 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done", "timeout": 32000}
function.name: execute_bash

Command: "# LibreLane PID 286668, output to /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log, no pipe issues.
# Monitor with 10-min polls until completion or 8h timeout.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=286668

for i in $(seq 1 48); do
  sleep 600
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-90)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  FINAL=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} | step=$STEP | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) | $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL" ] && echo "  *** GDS WRITTEN: $FINAL ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    echo "Run dir:"
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
    echo ""
    echo "Last 50 lines of log:"

    break

done" timed out
